'''竏喩-ch-m-p''' ('''kagachmepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:larp|larp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:larp|larp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喩-ch-m-p
|-
! Lemma
| kagachmepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigachmepoko|thigachmepoko]] || [[word:jigachmepoko|jigachmepoko]] || [[word:shigachmepoko|shigachmepoko]] || [[word:kigachmepoko|kigachmepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugachmepoko|thuthugachmepoko]] || [[word:jujugachmepoko|jujugachmepoko]] || [[word:shushugachmepoko|shushugachmepoko]] || [[word:kukugachmepoko|kukugachmepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugachmepoko|thugachmepoko]] || [[word:jugachmepoko|jugachmepoko]] || [[word:shugachmepoko|shugachmepoko]] || [[word:kugachmepoko|kugachmepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugachmepoko|thugachmepoko]] || [[word:jugachmepoko|jugachmepoko]] || [[word:shugachmepoko|shugachmepoko]] || [[word:kugachmepoko|kugachmepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegachmepoko|thegachmepoko]] || [[word:jegachmepoko|jegachmepoko]] || [[word:shegachmepoko|shegachmepoko]] || [[word:kegachmepoko|kegachmepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogachmepoko|thothogachmepoko]] || [[word:jojogachmepoko|jojogachmepoko]] || [[word:shoshogachmepoko|shoshogachmepoko]] || [[word:kokogachmepoko|kokogachmepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogachmepoko|thogachmepoko]] || [[word:jogachmepoko|jogachmepoko]] || [[word:shogachmepoko|shogachmepoko]] || [[word:kogachmepoko|kogachmepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogachmepoko|thogachmepoko]] || [[word:jogachmepoko|jogachmepoko]] || [[word:shogachmepoko|shogachmepoko]] || [[word:kogachmepoko|kogachmepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦgachmepoko|thﾃｦgachmepoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦgachmepoko|jﾃｦgachmepoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦgachmepoko|shﾃｦgachmepoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦgachmepoko|kﾃｦgachmepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagachmepoko|thathagachmepoko]] || [[word:jajagachmepoko|jajagachmepoko]] || [[word:shashagachmepoko|shashagachmepoko]] || [[word:kakagachmepoko|kakagachmepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagachmepoko|thagachmepoko]] || [[word:jagachmepoko|jagachmepoko]] || [[word:shagachmepoko|shagachmepoko]] || [[word:kagachmepoko|kagachmepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagachmepoko|thagachmepoko]] || [[word:jagachmepoko|jagachmepoko]] || [[word:shagachmepoko|shagachmepoko]] || [[word:kagachmepoko|kagachmepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
